chapter_title.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ حَرَّمَ مَكَّةَ حِينَ خَلَقَ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَ الْأَرْضَ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 12 – Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic Sancified Makkah when He<sup>azwj</sup> Created the skies and the earth

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/68)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/68)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ حَرَّمَ اللَّهُ حَرَمَهُ أَنْ يُخْتَلَى خَلَاهُ أَوْ يُعْضَدَ شَجَرُهُ إِلَّا الْإِذْخِرَ أَوْ يُصَادَ طَيْرُهُ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ib Fazzal, from Ibn Bukeyr, from Zurara who said,

‘I heard Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Sanctified His<sup>azwj</sup> Al-Harram, from it being vacated and being empty, or its trees to be tampered with except for Al-Izkhir (a fragrant tropical grass), or its birds from being hunted’.
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad, from ibn Faddal from ibn Bukayr from Zurarah who has said the following: “I once heard abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, say, ‘Allah has made His House sacred. He has prohibited uprooting of its grass, cutting down of its trees, except al-Idhkhir, and hunting its birds.’”
